name: Hytron Network Services
notes:
AS17433 - Hytron - Hytron maintains an open peering policy. Kindly get in touch with us if you’d like to set up peering with us over the public peering exchanges or private peering facilities announced on PeeringDB.

If your facility want to establish a Peering Session on the IX, please submit via https://peering.hytron.io/ or sent a e-mail to NOC/Peering/Technical.
If your facility needs an extra BGP session or specific egress route preferences, please feel free to contact us via the contact infomation.

Hytron NOC will response within 1-7 days.
